instruction: This pencil square icon needs a small cyan dot added back in the top-right (circle cx=112, cy=16, r=2, fill #06b6d4).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">

</svg>
target_svg:
